overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai warrior standing on a coastal cliff during a dramatic pink and gold sunset, then running through grassy hills and rocky terrain. The video showcases cinematic natural lighting over ocean and island vistas.

agents.ego_description: standing still on the rocky cliff edge gazing at the sunset over the ocean

entered.detail: large rocky outcrop where the character stands overlooking the ocean
vast ocean stretching to the horizon with purple and pink sky reflections
bright golden sun low on the horizon creating dramatic backlighting
rocky island formations visible in the distance across the water

segments.scene_description: The samurai stands motionless on a rocky cliff edge overlooking the ocean during a vibrant sunset. The camera slowly pans across the panoramic view of distant islands and pink clouds while the character observes the scenic coastal vista.

events.description: character transitions from standing still to running forward down the hillside

agents.ego_description: running steadily through tall grass and wildflowers down the hillside toward the trees

entered.detail: lush green grass covering the sloping terrain with scattered wildflowers
individual pine trees dotting the hillside landscape
massive rock outcrops visible in the distance against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character begins running through lush grass covering the hillside. The cliff and ocean exit view behind as scattered trees and distant rock formations come into the foreground, with the sun shifting toward the right side of the frame.

events.description: terrain changes from open grassland to enclosed path between large rocks and denser trees

agents.ego_description: running along a winding dirt path weaving between rock outcrops and trees

entered.detail: narrow dirt path cutting through the grass and rocks

segments.scene_description: The path narrows between large rock formations that now loom close on both sides. The character continues running along the dirt trail as the terrain becomes more enclosed with denser tree cover, while the setting sun creates long shadows through the rocks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, panoramic coastal vista into a confined, rocky woodland trail. It begins with a slow pan across a vibrant sunset and distant islands while a samurai stands motionless on a rocky cliff edge. As the character begins to run, the ocean view recedes behind them, and the scene opens into lush, grassy hillsides where scattered trees and rock formations enter the foreground. The path then narrows between looming rock walls that close in on both sides, shifting the environment from open fields to a dense, enclosed dirt trail. Finally, the camera follows the runner deeper into the tree cover as the setting sun casts long, dramatic shadows through the surrounding stone.
